creator: pyunyh@gmail.com
text:
On Wed, Mar 16, 2011 at 07:10:14PM +0000, Zack Dannar wrote:

>  yongari,
>  
>  I verified that the patch doesn't match a 8.2 host.  I will verify again as
>  well as upgrade.
>  

I verified it. It should apply to 8.2 without problems. You may see
some offset difference and patch is correctly applied. Make sure
you have installed 8.2-RELEASE before applying the patch.
